subject:
important conference call on qf/srac matters scheduled for

emails.subject:
Re: IMPORTANT CONFERENCE CALL ON QF/SRAC MATTERS SCHEDULED FOR
 12:30 P.M. (NOONISH) ON SUNDAY, JAN.  21
emails.subject_base:
IMPORTANT CONFERENCE CALL ON QF/SRAC MATTERS SCHEDULED FOR
 12:30 P.M. (NOONISH) ON SUNDAY, JAN.  21
emails.body: Re: IMPORTANT CONFERENCE CALL ON QF/SRAC MATTERS SCHEDULED FOR 12:30 P.M. (NOONISH) ON SUNDAY, JAN. 21 You need to be aware that we are in the process of selling the Wind Co. Mark Metts and Amit Walya are working on this. If the price changes under the QF contracts it would impact the sale. Call Amit to discuss (345-5570). Jeff Dasovich Sent by: Jeff Dasovich 01/21/2001 10:23 AM
